title: Hypocyrta monantha
taxonomy: Hypocyrta monantha is a species of fungus in the family Marasmiaceae. It belongs to the genus Hypocyrta, which is a group of small to medium-sized fungi. The family Marasmiaceae is a large and diverse group of fungi that are often found growing on decaying organic matter. Hypocyrta monantha is likely to be a type of saprotrophic fungus, meaning it obtains its nutrients by breaking down and decomposing dead organic matter. Further research may be necessary to determine the full classification and relationships of this species.
uses: Hypocyrta monantha is a species of fungus that has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, although information on its specific uses is limited.
